Daily Treasury Par Yield Curve Rates

These rates are commonly referred to as "Constant Maturity" Treasury rates, or CMTs. Yields are interpolated by the Treasury from the daily par yield curve.

Date 1 Mo 3 Mo 6 Mo 1 Yr 2 Yr 5 Yr 10 Yr 30 Yr
